assistant_summary: {"mode":"workstream","lane_count":2,"lanes":[{"lane_id":"workstream-1","title":"Refresh Primary Developer Documentation","summary":"Owns the primary user and contributor-facing documentation surface: inventory README authority, refresh setup/version/CLI/MCP/config/schema/testing/workflow guidance, and add or link maintainer guidance without changing runtime behavior.","owned_files":["README.md","CONTRIBUTING.md"],"allowed_touch_points":["AGENTS.md","CLAUDE.md","CHANGELOG.md","docs/adr/README.md","docs/templates/entirecontext-maintainer-decision-reuse-template.md"],"dependencies":[],"optional":false,"acceptance_criteria_slice":["AC-1","AC-2","AC-4"],"verification_hints":["rg -q --fixed-strings -- \"0.9.3\" README.md","rg -q --fixed-strings -- \"Python 3.12\" README.md","rg -q --fixed-strings -- \"SCHEMA_VERSION\" README.md"],"conflict_risks":["README.md is the main shared navigation surface; coordinate narrow link or status wording changes with workstream-2 if the reference-doc lane creates docs/documentation-review.md or changes docs/spec.md status.","CONTRIBUTING.md may be skipped by implementation if inventory shows README plus existing policy files are sufficient; if skipped, record contributor guidance in README.md instead."]},{"lane_id":"workstream-2","title":"Review And Resolve Reference Documentation Drift","summary":"Owns stale reference and review artifacts: classify or refresh docs/spec.md, review TEST_COVERAGE_ANALYSIS.md and decision outcome wording, and preserve source-grounded documentation review evidence when appropriate.","owned_files":["docs/spec.md","TEST_COVERAGE_ANALYSIS.md","docs/decisions_outcomes.md","docs/documentation-review.md"],"allowed_touch_points":["README.md","CHANGELOG.md","docs/adr/README.md"],"dependencies":["workstream-1"],"optional":false,"acceptance_criteria_slice":["AC-2","AC-3","AC-4","AC-5"],"verification_hints":["rg -q --fixed-strings -- \"schema version 14\" docs/spec.md","rg -q --fixed-strings -- \"documentation review\" docs/documentation-review.md","rg -q --fixed-strings -- \"remaining risk\" docs/documentation-review.md"],"conflict_risks":["docs/documentation-review.md is optional in the canonical plan; if review evidence is kept only in the final handoff, omit this file and make the final handoff carry AC-5 evidence.","docs/spec.md can be refreshed as living documentation or labeled historical; choose one status and keep README cross-references consistent.","README.md touch points must remain narrow because workstream-1 owns the primary README edits."]}]}
